name: Rust Docs MCP Server
what_it_does: Rust Docs MCP server enabling AI agents to search and retrieve Rust documentation — accessing the Rust standard library docs, querying crate documentation on docs.rs, searching for Rust functions and types, and integrating Rust's official documentation into agent-driven Rust development assistance and code generation workflows.
use_cases: Looking up Rust standard library function signatures from coding assistant agents
Searching docs.rs for crate documentation from Rust development agents
Retrieving Rust trait implementations and usage examples from learning agents
Querying Rust API documentation for code generation agents
Finding Rust idioms and best practices from code review agents
Accessing Rust crate documentation for dependency evaluation agents
not_for: Runtime debugging or profiling (this is documentation access only)
Teams not using Rust for development
best_when: A Rust developer or coding agent needs accurate, up-to-date Rust documentation — function signatures, trait bounds, and crate APIs — without hallucinating Rust-specific details.
avoid_when: You develop in other languages — use language-specific documentation MCPs.

auth.notes: No authentication — docs.rs and doc.rust-lang.org are public APIs. No API key required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — Rust docs are public
pricing.notes: Free open source from Zed Industries. Rust documentation is free and public. No costs.

performance.rate_limits: docs.rs: generous public API; avoid aggressive scraping

known_agent_gotchas: Rust documentation is version-specific — specify Rust edition (2021, 2024) in queries
Crate documentation on docs.rs is version-pinned — check latest version explicitly
Rust trait objects and lifetimes have complex doc representations
Zed Industries MCP — reflects Zed editor team's quality standards
docs.rs may have new crates without documentation if build failed
Nightly Rust features may not appear in stable docs — specify channel
agent_readiness.security_notes: No auth needed. HTTPS to public docs. No credentials. Official Zed Industries MCP. Public read-only data.

security_score_components.security_notes: No credentials. HTTPS. Public data. Official Zed Industries MCP. Zero security risk.
